summary: Associate Software Engineer - Campus Hiring Program . Work from anywhere (Remote) Service Agreement must be signed on or before the date of joining . Minimum commitment of 18 months (including 6-month probation period)  We are looking for PHP, MySQL, HTML, CSS and JavaScript developers and train them to build web solutions using mainly WordPress CMS/framework for our large enterprise clients such as Google, Facebook, IndianExpress, Penske Media and Al Jazeera . Responsibilities include delivering secure, scalable, and easy-to-maintain WordPress solutions using engineering best practices .  Strong problem-solving skills and the ability to learn new technologies quickly . Familiarity with front-end technologies such as Gutenberg, FSE, React.js, Vue.js and AngularJS . Manage time well and focus on details to meet deadlines .  Students from CS/CE/IT backgrounds welcome to apply . Shortlisting process will take anywhere from 15 to 30 business days . Interviews of shortlisted students will be conducted over Zoom .  Shortlisting will be based on open-source contributions on GitHub, specifically quality pull requests (PRs) to well-regarded projects . Students available to join in Jan 2026 .
